examples: Success in this heartland will be another milestone in building confidence that malaria can be defeated, once and for all.
I was raised in the heartland of my own country.
Chicago is a global city in the heartland of America.
The manufacturing heartland of the early gnome or dwarf centred on the town of Graefenroda in Germany.
The political imperative for Obama to shift his focus to the Heartland has never been clearer.
